name: source-code-book
description: Generate comprehensive source code analysis books for open-source projects. Chapter count is dynamically determined by code volume. Every significant implementation preserves its real code with line-by-line annotations.
author: hello_strong

changelog.2.0.0: Dynamic chapter planning based on LOC. Mandatory real code preservation. New Template D (Configuration) and Template E (Registry). Anti-patterns section. SSH push fallback.
changelog.1.0.0: Initial version based on CoolClaws pattern.
